story.text:
# 📖 Act 7: The Anti-Mirror
**act** · shared · narrative · first_person

The Mirror That Never Completes. Surveillance hits a 95% reconstruction ceiling. The gap IS the dignity.
> *One mirror observing both swordsman and mage collapses dignity into surveillance; two mirrors, each watching the other, preserve dignity through mutual witness.*

story.title: Read the full text
story.text: the full prose of this act, in the Library.
